phrases.finish: glossy but restrained premium finish; clean pure colors with subtle top-light sheen; no noise, no texture grain
phrases.lighting: directional light from the top, clear highlights, soft contact shadow
phrases.rendering: premium casual-game rendering: clean 3D-ish volumes with hand-painted baked lighting, readable silhouettes; neutral motifs only (stars, gems, ribbons, medals) — no species, no IP, no mascots
phrases.shape: rounded chunky silhouettes with soft corners; simple readable shapes with a thin darker-shade outline
